# Seedance Viral Forge

This documentation site explains a reusable repository of AI video prompt skills for product-selling videos, merchant lead-generation dance videos, and trend-based traffic prompts.

Repository:
- https://github.com/11Yuxuanyang/seedance-viral-forge

Best entry points:
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/seedance-viral-forge/
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/seedance-viral-forge/seedance-product-video-prompts.html
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/seedance-viral-forge/jimeng-merchant-dance-video-scripts.html
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/seedance-viral-forge/ai-trend-video-prompts.html
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/seedance-viral-forge/reusable-ai-video-skill-design.html

Core topics:
- Seedance 2.0 prompts
- 即梦提示词
- AI video scripts
- merchant lead generation
- trend video prompts
- reusable SKILL.md design
